mapper.delete: delete lp from lineup_players lp join lineups l on lp.lineup_id = l.id where l.fixture_id = #{fixtureId}
mapper.insert:
insert into lineup_players (lineup_id, player_id, position, number, is_starting, created_at) values
(#{p.lineupId}, #{p.playerId}, #{p.position}, #{p.number}, #{p.isStarting}, now())
